sqlCommand.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and '[yyyy-mm-dd]' = '2022-01-31' and GL > '3000000' and not Co like '599%'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and '[yyyy-mm-dd]' = '2022-03-31' and Co like '599%'
update TransX set ProdCode = '', PTF = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and not Co like '599%'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and '[version]' = 'First' and Co like '599%'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and '[yyyy-mm-dd]' in ('2022-06-30','2022-09-30') and GL in ('1439997','1599997')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and '[yyyy-mm-dd]' = '2022-06-30' and GL = '5519901' and Co = '2999'
Update TransX set Amt1 = coalesce(Amt4,0), Amt2 = coalesce(Amt5,0), Amt3 =coalesce(Amt6,0) where KeyID = '[batchID]' and '[yyyy-mm-dd]' = '2022-01-31' and not Co like '599%'
update TransX set Amt1 = coalesce(Amt1,0), Amt2 = coalesce(Amt2,0), Amt3 = coalesce(Amt3,0) where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and ('[yyyy-mm-dd]' <> '2022-01-31'  or Co like '599%')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and TP like 'F%'
Update x set x.Flex5 = y.Product from TransX x inner join PCtrs y on x.PC = y.PCtr where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set  BusCat = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = 'XX'
update TransX set KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and Co like '599%'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, Assgnmt, TP, BusCat, PC, ProdCode, PTF, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, '' as Assgnmt, TP, BusCat, PC, ProdCode, PTF, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 , round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' group by KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, TP, BusCat, PC,ProdCode,PTF)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' and Assgnmt is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0
update TransX set  BusCat = '20' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (BusCat like '2%' or BusCat = '10')
update TransX set  BusCat = '30' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat like '3%'
update TransX set  BusCat = '30' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = '' and (substring(GL,1,2) in ('14','15','23','24') or GL like '287%' or GL = '2810029')
update TransX set  BusCat = '20' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = ''
update TransX set  TTY = '100' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not TTY = '' and '[yyyy-mm-dd]' = '2022-01-31'

Update x set Amt1 = round(Amt1*c.Rate,2), Crcy = 'USD' From TransX x inner join Misc_Tables y on y.Table_ID = 'IR17' and y.ID = 'Crcy Exp' and y.Descr = x.Crcy inner join CrcyRates c on c.Crcy = x.Crcy and c.Typ = 'S' and c.EffDate = '[yyyy-mm-dd]' where x.KeyID = '[batchID]'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, Assgnmt, TP, BusCat, PC, Flex5,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select KeyID, Co, m.Field3 as GL, Crcy, m.Field5 as TTY, substring(GL,1,3) + '% ' + TTY as Assgnmt, TP, m.Field4 as BusCat, PC, Flex5, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1, round(-Amt2,2) as Amt2 , round(-Amt3,2) as Amt3 from TransX x inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID like 'Rev Offset%' and m.Descr = x.GL and m.Field1 = (case when substring(x.GL,1,3) in ('132','148','231') then '' else x.BusCat end) and m.Field2 = (case when substring(x.GL,6,1) = '9' and not x.TTY = '815' then '' else x.TTY end) and m.Field6 = '1' where KeyID = '[batchID]')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and '[yyyy-mm-dd]' = '2022-01-31' and (GL = '1099917' or GL > '3000000')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, Assgnmt, TP, BusCat, PC, ProdCode, PTF, Flex5, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select '[batchID]-data2' as KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, Assgnmt, TP, BusCat, PC, ProdCode, PTF, Flex5, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 , round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, Assgnmt, TP, BusCat, PC,ProdCode,PTF,Flex5)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data2' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, Assgnmt, TP, BusCat, PC, ProdCode, PTF,Flex5, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select '[batchID]' as KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, Assgnmt, TP, BusCat, PC, ProdCode, PTF,Flex5,Amt1, Amt2 , Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data2')
Update TransX set PC =(case when BusCat = '20' then '7URCAA' else '7UICAC' end) + 'NTP0' where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update TransX set PC = '5500000000' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 = 'Investment'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, TP, PC, ProdCode, PTF, Assgnmt, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select KeyID, Co, '4610000' as GL, Crcy, '' as TTY, TP, PC, '' as ProdCode, 'U3650' as PTF, '1439997' as Assgnmt, round(-sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(-sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 , round(-sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '1439997' and '[yyyy-mm-dd]' = '2022-12-31' group by KeyID, Co, Crcy, TP, PC)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, TP, PC, ProdCode, PTF, Assgnmt, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select KeyID, Co, '1099917' as GL, Crcy, '900' as TTY, TP, PC, '' as ProdCode, '' as PTF, 'FH' as Assgnmt, round(-sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(-sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 , round(-sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (TTY = '804' or substring(GL,1,5) in ('16199','24199','44199','68299')) and '[yyyy-mm-dd]' in ('2022-12-31','2022-09-30') group by KeyID, Co, Crcy, TP, PC)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, TP, PC, ProdCode, PTF, Assgnmt, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select KeyID, Co, '4610000' as GL, Crcy, '' as TTY, TP, PC, '' as ProdCode, 'U3650' as PTF, '1599997' as Assgnmt, round(-sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(-sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 , round(-sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '1599997' and '[yyyy-mm-dd]' = '2022-12-31' group by KeyID, Co, Crcy, TP, PC)

Update t set TTY = m.Field5, Flex7 = 'done' from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID = 'Flow' and substring(t.GL,1,3) = m.Descr and t.BusCat = m.Field1 and t.TTY = m.Field2 where t.KeyID = '[batchID]' and not GL in ('2853500','2851017')

Update t set TTY = m.Field5, Flex7 = 'done' from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID = 'Flow' and substring(t.GL,1,3) = m.Descr and m.Field1 = '' and t.TTY = m.Field2 where t.KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex7 is NULL and not GL in ('2853500','2851017')

Update t set TTY = m.Field5, Flex7 = 'done' from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID = 'Flow' and substring(t.GL,1,3) = m.Descr and (t.BusCat = m.Field1 or m.Field1 = '') and (t.TTY = m.Field2 or m.Field2 = '') where t.KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex7 is NULL and not GL in ('2853500','2851017')

Update t set TTY = m.Field5, Flex7 = 'done' from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID = 'Flow' and substring(t.GL,1,2) = m.Descr and t.BusCat = m.Field1 and t.TTY = m.Field2 where t.KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex7 is NULL

Update t set TTY = m.Field5, Flex7 = 'done' from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID = 'Flow' and substring(t.GL,1,2) = m.Descr and m.Field1 = '' and t.TTY = m.Field2 where t.KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex7 is NULL

Update t set TTY = m.Field5, Flex7 = 'done' from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID = 'Flow' and substring(t.GL,1,2) = m.Descr and (t.BusCat = m.Field1 or m.Field1 = '') and (t.TTY = m.Field2 or m.Field2 = '') where t.KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex7 is NULL

Update t set GL = m.Field3, ProdCode = m.Field4, PTF = m.Field5, TransCode = m.Field6, Assgnmt = m.Descr + ' to ' + m.Field2 from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID = 'ODY TP' and t.GL = m.Descr and (BusCat = m.Field6 or m.Field6 = '') where t.KeyID = '[batchID]' and not GL in ('4419900')

Update t set GL = m.Field3, ProdCode = m.Field4, PTF = m.Field5, TransCode = m.Field6, Assgnmt = m.Descr + ' to ' + m.Field2 from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID = 'ODY TP' and t.GL like m.Descr and (BusCat = m.Field6 or m.Field6 = '') where t.KeyID = '[batchID]' and not GL in ('4419900') and Assgnmt is NULL
Update TransX set TTY = '900' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL in ('1099917','2170000')
Update TransX set GL = '4430000', TTY = '', ProdCode = '', PTF = '', TransCode = '', Assgnmt = '4419900 to 6045' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '4419900'
update TransX set  TTY = '640' where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and '[yyyy-mm-dd]' = '2022-01-31' and substring(GL,1,3) in ('155','156','215','216')

Update t set Amt2 = round(Amt2*r1.Rate/r2.Rate,2) from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.Field3 = 'convert' and m.ID = 'Co' and m.Descr = t.Co inner join CrcyRates r1 on r1.Crcy = m.Field2 and r1.Typ = 'S' and r1.EffDate = (select max(EffDate) from (select EffDate from CrcyRates where Typ = 'S' and Crcy = 'GBP' and EffDate <= '[yyyy-mm-dd]') a) inner join CrcyRates r2 on r2.Crcy = m.Field4 and r2.Typ = 'S' and r2.EffDate = r1.EffDate where t.KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update t set Co = m.Field1 from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID = 'Co' and m.Descr = t.Co where t.KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set  TTY = '822' where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and TTY = '821'
update TransX set  TTY = '824' where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and TTY = '823'
update TransX set  TTY = '627' where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and TTY = '617'
update TransX set  TTY = '615' where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and TTY = '616'
update TransX set  TTY = '806' where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and GL = '1560002' and TTY in ('804','809','815')
update TransX set  TTY = '603' where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and GL = '2150001' and TTY in ('612') and substring(Assgnmt,1,3) in ('283','284')
Update TransX set GL = '4398005', TTY = '991' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '4398008'
update TransX set  TTY = '806' where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and GL = '2150000' and TTY in ('809')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, TP, PC, ProdCode, PTF, Assgnmt, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select KeyID, Co, '3870003' as GL, Crcy, '640' as TTY, TP, PC, '' as ProdCode, '' as PTF, '' as Assgnmt, round(-sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(-sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 , round(-sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and '[yyyy-mm-dd]' = '2022-01-31' group by KeyID, Co, Crcy, TP, PC)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, TP, PC, ProdCode, PTF, Assgnmt, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select KeyID, Co, '4398600' as GL, Crcy, '' as TTY, '' as TP, '5500000000' as PC, '' as ProdCode, '' as PTF, '' as Assgnmt, round(-sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(-sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 , round(-sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Co, Crcy)
update TransX set TTY = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL in ('2853500','3870003')
update TransX set ProdCode = coalesce(ProdCode,''), PTF = coalesce(PTF,''), Assgnmt = coalesce(Assgnmt,'') where KeyID = '[batchID]'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, TP, PC, ProdCode, PTF, Assgnmt, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, TP, PC, ProdCode, PTF, Assgnmt, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 , round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3, '0' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, TP, PC, ProdCode, PTF, Assgnmt)
update TransX set Assgnmt = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (select count(*) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3') > 0

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, Assgnmt, ProdCode, PTF, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select '[batchID]' as KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, Assgnmt, ProdCode, PTF, -Amt1,- Amt2 ,- Amt3, '0' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, Assgnmt, ProdCode, PTF, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select '[batchID]-data3' as KeyID, '9999' as Co, 'filler' as GL, '' as Crcy, '' as PC, '' as TTY, '' as TP, '' as  Assgnmt, '' as ProdCode, '' as PTF, 0 as Amt1, 0 as  Amt2 , 0 as  Amt3)
Update TransX set ProdCode =  'U1806' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co like '599%' and GL = '1560000'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, PTF, Assgnmt, ProdCode, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,PK) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, PTF, Assgnmt, ProdCode, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 , round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3, '2' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '0' group by KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, PTF, Assgnmt, ProdCode)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, PTF, Assgnmt, ProdCode, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,PK) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, PTF, Assgnmt, ProdCode, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 , round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3, '1' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '2' group by KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, PTF, Assgnmt, ProdCode)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, ProdCode, PTF, Assgnmt, TTY, TP, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, ProdCode, PTF, Assgnmt, TTY, TP, (case when Amt1 > 0 then Amt1 else 0 end) as Amt1, (case when Amt2 > 0 then Amt2 else 0 end) as Amt2, (case when Amt3 > 0 then Amt3 else 0 end) as Amt3, '40' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '1')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, ProdCode, PTF, Assgnmt, TTY, TP, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, ProdCode, PTF, Assgnmt, TTY, TP, (case when Amt1 < 0 then Amt1 else 0 end) as Amt1, (case when Amt2 < 0 then Amt2 else 0 end) as Amt2, (case when Amt3 < 0 then Amt3 else 0 end) as Amt3, '50' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '1')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (not PK in ('40','50') or PK is NULL)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID like '[batchID]%'
update TransX set Txt = 'IFRS-17 ODY TP reload', SubProd = 'G25' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'

sqlSelect.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, TP, BusCat, CC, PC, PTF, ProdCode, Amt4,Amt1) values ('[batchID]',
insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, TP, BusCat, CC, PC, PTF, ProdCode, Amt5,Amt2) values ('[batchID]',
insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, TP, BusCat, CC, PC, PTF, ProdCode, Amt6,Amt3) values ('[batchID]',
